absorption: VAL seviyesine yakin fiyat (-1 delta, 1 hacim) = BID absorption gozlendi, kurumsal alis baskisi tespit edildi
dom_observation: BID/ASK orani 1.16 (alis agir), bid derinligi 81>ask 70, alis baskisi net
htf_alignment: 5m BULL + 1h BULL + 4h BULL (3/3 uyum), 15m BEAR ragmen buyuk timeframe consensus BULLISH
session_bias: Session delta +254907 (guclü pozitif), buy_sell_ratio 1.26 (alis baskisi), buy_volume 1.26M > sell_volume 0.97M
reasoning: VAL seviyesinde negatif delta ile BID absorption + session delta guclü pozitif + DOM alis agir + HTF 3/3 bullish uyum = net long setup, VAL desteginden yukselis icin hazir
